Best Regional Universities Midwest Rankings

Best Regional Universities Midwest Rankings

Regional Universities offer a full range of undergraduate programs and some master's programs but few doctoral programs. These rankings are split into four regions: North, South, Midwest and West. Read the methodology »

Summary

Here are the best universities in the Midwest

  • Butler University
  • John Carroll University
  • Milwaukee School of Engineering
  • Calvin University
  • Dordt University
  • Rockhurst University
  • Augustana University
  • Elmhurst University
  • Truman State University
See The Full Rankings
